messages.text: A red berserker rage floods your limbs; your blows land harder and faster, though your guard falls away.
{name} is seized by a red berserker rage, all fury and no guard.
The berserker rage burns out of you and your guard steadies again.
The berserker rage drains out of {name}, and their guard returns.
{name} is gripped by a berserker rage, striking wildly with their guard thrown to the wind.
